historical_signed_zone.algorithm: Ed25519 / EdDSA detached .sig over canonical zone JSON
historical_signed_zone.purpose: signed badge/zone registry continuity and public verification

runtime_request_signing.purpose: middleware/runtime authorization flows such as request signing

safe_harbor.dev_mode: disabled by default in public ship

safe_harbor_surface_policy.eo_shorthand: EO-RFD route conscience / context lane (interface_context; design_signal)
safe_harbor_surface_policy.dome_world_receipt_policy: reference-only; no exact coordinates, trainer history, or sensitive text
safe_harbor_surface_policy.claim_limit: custody and replay posture only; not civil identity, legal identity, public law approval, state recognition, or authorship ownership

historical_example_note: The published payload-5 footer is historical only. New attestations must use the live template with payload {n}.
